  • Uses of ResourceIO in org.episteme.core.bibliography.loaders

    Subinterfaces of ResourceIO in org.episteme.core.bibliography.loaders
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    CatalogReader
    Interface for loading bibliographical catalogs of books or articles.
    Classes in org.episteme.core.bibliography.loaders that implement ResourceIO
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ArticleCatalogReader
    Loader for scientific article catalogs, supporting interfaces with major research databases like PubMed, CrossRef, or arXiv.
    class 
    BookCatalogReader
    Loader for book catalogs, supporting interfaces with major library databases like OpenLibrary, Library of Congress, or local records.
    class 
    CrossRefReader
    Modernized connector to CrossRef API for DOI resolution and citation metadata.

    Subinterfaces of ResourceIO in org.episteme.core.io
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ResourceReader<T>
    Interface for components that read/load resources.
    interface 
    ResourceWriter<T>
    Interface for writing/exporting resources.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractResourceReader<T>
    Abstract base for resource readers with caching and fallback support.
    class 
    AbstractResourceWriter<T>
    Abstract base for resource writers.
